ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Financials) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the day */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid per share */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date on which the stock trades without the dividend */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend payment is made */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield (annual dividend divided by stock price) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the company records the shareholders eligible for the dividend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the split (e.g., 2 for a 2-for-1 split) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the split becomes effective */,
  "reverse_split" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the split is a reverse split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "investment_role" TEXT /* Role of the investor (e.g., retail, institutional) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the investor */,
  "investment_experience" INTEGER /* Years of investment experience of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction record */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor making the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares transacted */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "base_year" INTEGER /* Base year for calculating index values */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the market index is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market index is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the index for the day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the index for the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the index for the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the index for the day */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the index price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the index price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the analyst has */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications the analyst holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst providing the rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being rated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Analyst rating (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating provided by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist record */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor's watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being watched */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who created the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the report is about */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Textual data or analysis provided in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, technical) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view report) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., analyst, trader, administrator) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)
